purpose: Construct a sidecar document (e.g. JSON or row bundle) for one artifact that conforms to tables/switching_semantic_sidecar_template.csv.
required_inputs: artifact_path, workspace_root, optional registry row, optional run_id, created_at_utc
required_outputs: sidecar struct or file path written with all required fields populated or explicitly empty where optional
must_not_do: Mutate the described artifact; rename files; apply lint fixes; run analysis; write to canonical outputs without gating.
failure_behavior: On missing required inputs or invalid enum: return error struct with code; do not write partial sidecar for replay_safe or canonical_safe true.
required_before_phase4_replay: YES for production replay; NO for ad-hoc probes if sidecars skipped
optional_for_diagnostics: NO when producing artifacts intended for Phase 4; YES for read-only dry runs
notes: Implementation deferred in Phase 2.5; contract only.

purpose: Build a run-level manifest record conforming to tables/switching_semantic_run_manifest_template.csv after or during a Switching run.
required_inputs: run_id, module, executing_script, source_commit, start_time_utc, input_artifacts, output_artifacts, semantic_family_id
must_not_do: Modify scripts; execute MATLAB; delete artifacts; mark replay_safe without validation.
failure_behavior: INVALID_MANIFEST error if required fields missing; WARN-level messages collected separately.
optional_for_diagnostics: NO when running narrow diagnostics without manifest persistence

purpose: Validate one sidecar instance against the template: types, required keys, enums, cross-checks to taxonomy and registry when paths resolve.
required_inputs: sidecar content object or file path; workspace_root
must_not_do: Fix sidecar automatically; promote canonical_safe; suppress HARD_FAIL for unsafe promotion.
failure_behavior: Return fail with reasons; HARD_FAIL path only when canonical_safe or authoritative promotion contradicts matrix.
notes: Shares rule catalog with Phase 3 preflight.

purpose: Validate manifest completeness and consistency with sidecars and Phase 2 tables.
required_inputs: manifest content or path; optional list of sidecar paths
required_outputs: validation_status; per-field errors; optional duration check
failure_behavior: Return fail; never launch heavy replay from validator.

purpose: Load tables/switching_semantic_materialized_artifact_registry.csv (and optional caches) for lookups by script path or artifact.
required_inputs: workspace_root or explicit path to CSV
required_outputs: table struct or in-memory registry object; load_errors if malformed
must_not_do: Rewrite registry; filter rows for promotion without audit trail.
failure_behavior: Empty registry with error if file missing; WARN if schema drift vs contract.

purpose: Map artifact_path or producer script plus optional column class to semantic_family_id and recommended_alias using taxonomy and alias_map.
must_not_do: Infer forbidden_evidence as authoritative; rename columns.
failure_behavior: UNKNOWN_FAMILY WARN unless explicitly unmapped in policy.

purpose: Evaluate switching_semantic_lint_rules.csv against text artifacts labels paths and sidecar fields; emit WARN by default.
required_inputs: workspace_root; target paths or strings; rule subset optional
required_outputs: lint_status aggregate; rule_id keyed messages; severity per rule
must_not_do: Auto-edit files to satisfy rules; downgrade HARD_FAIL except policy.
failure_behavior: Non-zero or fail status on HARD_FAIL rules (unsafe promotion); WARN otherwise.
notes: Must preserve SW_LINT_019 class HARD_FAIL for unsafe authority promotion per Phase 2 report.

purpose: Append or upsert key-value rows in a status CSV for Phase gates (e.g. phase25 or Phase 3 completion).
required_inputs: status_csv_path; key-value pairs; append mode flag
required_outputs: written file confirmation; optional backup path
must_not_do: Overwrite unrelated keys without merge policy; commit git.
failure_behavior: IO error returned to caller; no partial corrupt file preferred atomic write.
notes: Does not replace Phase 3 runner status; utility only.
